basic_details.job_title: Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri Library Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Gram Panchayat Library and Information Center Supervisor
basic_details.short_information: The Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri (ZPY) has officially announced the Gram Panchayat Library and Information Center Supervisor Recruitment 2026 with 12 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. JPANYA/A/C-1/56107/2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 40 years (General), 43 years (2A, 2B, 3A, 3B), and 45 years (SC/ST/Category-1) and hold PUC qualification along with Certificate Course in Library Science, 3 months Computer Course, or Degree in Library Science can submit their online applications before 27 July 2026. Direct links to download t

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years (General) Maximum Age: 43 years (2A, 2B, 3A, 3B) Maximum Age: 45 years (SC/ST/Category-1) Age relaxation for Ex-servicemen, Widow, PWD will be as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PUC, Certificate Course in Library Science, 3 months Computer Course, Degree in Library Science
qualification.details: PUC with Certificate Course in Library Science and 3 months Computer Course or Degree in Library Science

salary_details.pay_scale: Minimum wages as per RDPR 425 Jipal 2023 dated 13.02.2024 plus VDA
salary_details.details: Minimum wages as per RDPR 425 Jipal 2023 dated 13.02.2024 plus VDA

selection_process: Merit List based on marks and roster reservation Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri Gram Panchayat Library and Information Center Supervisor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri Gram Panchayat Library and Information Center Supervisor Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri Gram Panchayat Library and Information Center Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Gram Panchayat Library and Information Center Supervisor posts is 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Gram Panchayat Library and Information Center Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for the Gram Panchayat Library and Information Center Supervisor position by Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for candidates applying for this recruitment is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed PUC with a Certificate Course in Library Science and a 3 months Computer Course, or possess a Degree in Library Science.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from marks obtained and roster reservation, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the recruited supervisors?
faq.answer: The salary will be based on minimum wages as per RDPR 425 Jipal 2023 dated 13.02.2024, plus Variable Dearness Allowance (VDA).

faq.question: Q8. What is the maximum age limit for the General category?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates belonging to the General category is 40 years.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are provided for categories 2A, 2B, 3A, 3B (up to 43 years) and SC/ST/Category-1 (up to 45 years), as well as for Ex-servicemen, Widows, and PWD as per rules.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of Zilla Panchayat Yadgiri on or before the last date of application.
